positive: A vibrant, flat lay vector illustration of a perfect cup of steaming latte art surrounded by aesthetically pleasing pastries and botanical elements. The composition is clean, modern, and maximalist in a tasteful way. Include stylized croissants, small macarons, dried lavender sprigs, and delicate coffee beans scattered around the cup. The color palette should be muted pastels (sage green, dusty rose, cream, terracotta). Style: Modern vector art, flat design, Scandinavian aesthetic, high detail, clean lines, professional food photography style, trending on Pinterest, 4k, editorial illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, messy background, clutter, poor composition
